description: Entries about mindfulness practice, asking about mental wellness

memory_chunks.content: Did my first 10-minute meditation this morning using the Headspace app. My mind wandered constantly but I kept bringing it back. Apparently that's the whole point.
Skipped meditation for four days. When I finally came back to it today I noticed how much more anxious I've been. The correlation is hard to ignore now.
Tried a body scan meditation before bed. Actually fell asleep during it which I think is a success. Slept more deeply than I have in weeks.
30-day streak on meditation today. My anxiety hasn't disappeared but I feel like I have more space between a stressful moment and my reaction to it.

query: How has my mindfulness and mental wellness practice been going?
